app.name: Runway
app.one_sentence_promise: Shows freelancers and irregular-income earners exactly how many days of runway they have left, without linking a bank account.
app.target_user: Freelancers, contractors, and gig workers with irregular income who find steady-paycheck budgeting apps useless or overwhelming.
app.painful_moment: Constant low-grade anxiety about how long you could coast if work dried up, with no simple, privacy-respecting way to see it.
app.why_different: One core number — days of runway — projected from manually entered recurring and one-off entries, explicitly with no bank linking, a real privacy-first differentiator against account-linked competitors.
app.why_users_pay: Multiple what-if scenario projections, historical accuracy tracking of past projections, recurring-income templates for freelance patterns, tax-quarter export.
app.subscription_model: Free: single runway projection, manual entries. Paid: scenario modeling, historical tracking, export.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Fully on-device ledger of income/expense entries with recurring-entry support and runway calculation.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Optional cloud backup/sync; possible opt-in CSV statement import later, still never live account linking.
core_workflows: Review historical accuracy of past projections
ios_native_features: Widgets showing current runway at a glance
Live Activities for a runway countdown during a lean stretch
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: None — an honest, non-ML personal finance tool by design.
app.design_direction: Calm, confidence-inspiring — a single hero number as the centerpiece, muted premium palette, no alarmist red/green gamification.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a calm personal-finance app centered on one hero number (days of runway): a minimal entry-logging flow, a muted-palette runway dashboard, and a simple what-if scenario comparison view.
app.app_store_positioning: Know your runway — without linking your bank account to another app.
key_risks: Manual-entry discipline is the single biggest adoption risk
Entry must take under 5 seconds or it won't stick
Competing against free bank-linked apps requires the privacy pitch to be foregrounded clearly
app.invalidation_criteria: If active logging drops off sharply after week 2, manual-only entry is unsustainable and needs an import or receipt-photo shortcut.
app.v1_build_scope: Entry logging with recurring support, runway calculation/display, one what-if scenario, historical log view.
